24.kj: be accepted, cast (down, self, (lots), out), cease, die, divide (by lot), (let) fail, (cause to, let, make, ready to) fall (away, down, -en, -ing), fell(-ing), fugitive, have (inhe

24.gl: properly, to build up or support; to foster as a parent or nurse; figuratively to render (or be) firm or faithful, to trust or believe, to be permanent or quiet; morally to be true or certain;
24.kj: hence, assurance, believe, bring up, establish, [phrase] fail, be faithful (of long continuance, stedfast, sure, surely, trusty, verified), nurse, (-ing father), (put), trust, turn
24.dv: a primitive root; (Isaiah 30:21; interchangeable with H541 (אָמַן), to go to the right hand)

24.gl: to laugh (in pleasure or detraction); by implication, to play
24.kj: deride, have in derision, laugh, make merry, mock(-er), play, rejoice, (laugh to) scorn, be in (make) sport.

24.gl: illumination or (concrete) luminary (in every sense, including lightning, happiness, etc.)
24.kj: bright, clear, [phrase] day, light (-ning), morning, sun.

25.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
25.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

25.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
25.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
25.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

25.gl: to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively)
25.kj: abide, continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-er), have habitation, inhabit, lay, place, (cause to) remain, rest, set (up).
25.dv: a primitive root (apparently akin (by transmission) to H7901 (שָׁכַב) through the idea of lodging; compare H5531 (סִכְלוּת), H7925 (שָׁכַם));

25.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
25.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

25.gl: properly, to sigh, i.e. breathe strongly; by implication, to be sorry, i.e. (in a favorable sense) to pity, console or (reflexively) rue; or (unfavorably) to avenge (oneself)
properly, to try, i.e. (by implication) select
25.kj: acceptable, appoint, choose (choice), excellent, join, be rather, require.
